name: Joshua Rifkin
description: American conductor, keyboard player, and musicologist
abstract: Joshua Rifkin (born April 22, 1944) is an American conductor, pianist, and musicologist. He is currently a professor of music at Boston University.

about_quotes.speaker: Schuller Gunther
about_quotes.evidence: Joshua Rifkin had made a recording for Nonesuch of Scott Joplin rags. That was the first time anybody had recorded any ragtime. He did it, and he, in my opinion, although it’s very beautiful, he turned it too much into a really classical music.
about_quotes.doc_title: Schuller Gunther — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
